overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a walk along a desert city street bordered by red rock formations. The player character walks past various NPC pedestrians and observes a large flying cargo ship passing overhead in a bright, arid environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert city sidewalk with red rock hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road

entered.detail: large reddish desert rock hillside with sparse vegetation covering the left side of the street
wide concrete sidewalk with red painted curb lines
asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic
tall modern street light with horizontal orange glowing bar
large digital billboard displaying purple and pink neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright desert city street with a red rock formation on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. The player walks forward along a paved sidewalk, passing futuristic street lamps and holographic billboards. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy desert city street with approaching pedestrians

events.description: large flying cargo ship enters the sky from the upper right

agents.ego_description: walking through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing various NPCs on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive industrial flying vehicle with glowing thrusters entering from the right side of the sky

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking forward as pedestrian density increases. Various NPCs walk in opposing directions, including a notable character with red hair. A massive flying cargo ship enters the sky from the right. The street lamps and billboards grow closer as the player advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view tracking flying vehicle

events.description: camera tilts upward to track the flying cargo ship passing overhead

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to watch the flying cargo ship pass overhead, temporarily pausing forward progression

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to follow the massive flying cargo ship as it passes directly overhead. The ship dominates the sky with its industrial design and glowing thrusters. Ground elements remain visible at the bottom of the frame while the player observes the aerial vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert city street continuing toward distant buildings

events.description: camera returns to forward-facing walking position

agents.ego_description: resuming forward walk along the sidewalk, passing more pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to its forward-facing position as the player resumes walking along the desert street. The flying ship has passed out of view. The player continues past pedestrians and observes traffic including a yellow taxi on the road, with the red rock formation still present on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a bright desert city street that shifts from a steady urban stroll to a moment of aerial awe before returning to the ground. It begins on a paved sidewalk bordered by a red rock formation and holographic billboards, moving forward past sparse pedestrian traffic and futuristic street lamps. As the player advances, the crowd of NPCs grows denser, including a red-haired character, just as a massive flying cargo ship enters the frame from the right. The camera then tilts upward to follow the industrial vessel and its glowing thrusters as it dominates the sky, momentarily obscuring the horizon. Finally, the view returns to the street level to resume the walk past a yellow taxi and other vehicles, with the red rocks remaining a constant presence on the left.
